differential_diagnoses: Hypervirulent Klebsiella pneumoniae (hvKP) syndrome with metastatic endophthalmitis
Staphylococcus aureus sepsis with endocarditis and metastatic endophthalmitis
next_steps: Perform ophthalmology consultation for urgent vitreous tap for Gram stain, culture, and PCR
Perform interventional radiology-guided aspiration or drainage of the hepatic abscess for microbiology
Perform transesophageal echocardiography (TEE) to rule out endocarditis
Test HbA1c and fasting blood glucose to assess for occult diabetes mellitus
Send blood and tissue cultures specifically for fungal and fastidious organisms (e.g., Burkholderia)
Consult infectious disease specialist for optimization of empiric antimicrobial coverage based on preliminary stains
Screen for HIV and other underlying immunocompromising conditions
